task: Find support services jobs in Bentonville, in the state of Arkansas.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found Walmart Careers results filtered to Bentonville, Arkansas with the Support Services career area selected. Evidence: after applying location Bentonville, AR, the results page showed '13 open roles' and the filter panel explicitly showed 'Support Services, selected' under Corporate. The final snapshots list the jobs on page 1 and page 2, matching the assistant’s summary: e.g., Specialist, Building Controls; Manager, Global Payroll; Senior Analyst, Supplier Contract Management; Analyst, Temp Services (H); Manager, Contact Center; Senior Executive Assistant; Senior Manager, Account Receivable - Health and Wellness; Executive Assistant; (USA) Senior Manager, Supplier To Serve - Inventory Count Operational Excellence; (USA) Senior Manager, Account Receivable; plus page 2 roles Manager, Financial Planning and Analysis - eCommerce Marketplace and two Executive Assistant entries. Minor duplication/imprecision in the final wording does not negate that the correct filtered results were found and reported.
final_result_response:
I found 13 open Support Services roles in Bentonville, Arkansas on Walmart Careers:

3. Senior Analyst, Supplier Contract Management - Bentonville, AR - $50,000-$95,000/yr
4. Analyst, Temp Services (H) - Other #9401, Bentonville, AR 72716-6209 - Multiple shifts - $21.00-$40.00/hr
5. Manager, Contact Center - Bentonville, AR - $60,000-$110,000/yr
6. Senior Executive Assistant - Bentonville, AR - $50,000-$95,000/yr
7. Senior Manager, Account Receivable - Health and Wellness - Bentonville, AR - $80,000-$155,000/yr
8. Executive Assistant - Bentonville, AR - $45,000-$80,000/yr
9. (USA) Senior Manager, Supplier To Serve - Inventory Count Operational Excellence - Bentonville, AR - $80,000-$155,000/yr
10. (USA) Senior Manager, Account Receivable - Bentonville, AR - $80,000-$155,000/yr
11. Manager, Financial Planning and Analysis - eCommerce Marketplace - Bentonville, AR - $60,000-$110,000/yr

13. Executive Assistant - Bentonville, AR - $45,000-$80,000/yr

I left the filtered results open on the Walmart Careers page.
action_history: Opening Walmart careers: const p1 = await openTab('https://careers.walmart.com/');
Searching support services: await page.locator('e10').fill('support services');
Searching support services: await page.locator('e11').click();
Submitting search: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening support services jobs: await page.locator('e120').click();
Searching from page search field: await page.locator('e142').fill('support services');
Searching from page search field: await page.locator('e143').click();
Submitting search again: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Viewing more related roles: await page.locator('e257').click();
Opening location filter: await page.locator('e296').click();
Entering Bentonville location: await page.locator('e373').fill('Bentonville, AR');
Applying Bentonville location: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting Bentonville and saving: await page.locator('e386').click();
Saving location filter: await page.locator('e383').click();
Checking filters: await page.locator('e297').click();
Expanding corporate filters: await page.locator('e462').click();
Applying filters: await page.locator('e465').click();
Opening second result page: await page.locator('e541').click();
Returning to first results page: await page.locator('e558').click();
Rechecking second page count: await page.locator('e598').click();
